label: Cybersecurity Risk-Management Policies and Documentation
description: Documentation covering all 10 Article 21(2) measure categories: risk analysis policy, incident handling procedures, business continuity/backup/disaster recovery plans, supply chain security assessment, NIS acquisition/development/maintenance security policies, effectiveness assessment procedures, cyber hygiene and training programme, cryptography/encryption policy, HR security and access control policy, MFA implementation records.
platform: Internal governance records; available to competent authority on request or during supervision
frequency: Maintained continuously; reviewed at least annually or when significant changes occur

label: Management Body Approval of Cybersecurity Measures
description: Board resolution, minutes, or equivalent governance record confirming formal approval of cybersecurity risk-management measures by the management body.
platform: Internal governance records; available to competent authority on request
frequency: One-time; updated whenever measures are significantly revised

label: Management Body Cybersecurity Training Completion Records
description: Training completion certificates, attendance records, or equivalent documentation showing each member of the management body has completed cybersecurity training.
platform: Internal HR/training records; available to competent authority on request
frequency: At least once; regular ongoing training encouraged

label: Early Warning Notification to CSIRT
description: Transmitted early warning record (email, portal submission, or equivalent) sent to the CSIRT or competent authority within 24 hours of becoming aware of a significant incident.
platform: National CSIRT or competent authority reporting portal / direct communication

label: Incident Notification to CSIRT (72-Hour)
description: Incident notification submitted to the CSIRT or competent authority within 72 hours, containing initial assessment of severity, impact, and available indicators of compromise.
platform: National CSIRT or competent authority reporting portal

label: Final Incident Report (1 Month)
description: Final report submitted to CSIRT or competent authority within one month of the incident notification, containing full description, root cause analysis, mitigation measures, and cross-border impact.
platform: National CSIRT or competent authority reporting portal

label: Registration with Competent Authority
description: Registration record with the competent authority of the Member State of main establishment.
platform: National competent authority registration portal or mechanism established by Member State
frequency: One-time; update within 2 weeks of any changes

label: ENISA Registry Submission
description: Submission to ENISA's registry for digital infrastructure / digital provider entities.

label: Domain Name Registration Database
description: Maintained WHOIS-equivalent database with accurate and complete domain name registration data. Non-personal data made publicly available; specific registrant data provided on lawful request within 72 hours.
platform: Internal database; public non-personal data layer; request-response process for personal data
